title: Agent Kit project manifest
description: Distribution manifest for an installed Agent Kit workspace (.cursor/agent-kit.json). Tracks kit version, L1 packs, L2 skills, and L3 paths that update must never overwrite. Distinct from agent-kit.config.json (CLI scan/wizard profile).

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest format version. Bump only on breaking field changes.

profile.description: Install profile id used at bootstrap (e.g. default, lean).

packs.description: L1 domain pack ids installed (opt-in). See docs/layers-spec.md.

skills.description: L2 stack skill ids installed from the registry.

protected.description: Globs relative to project root that agent-kit update must never overwrite (L3 + session state).

path.description: Project-relative path of the L3 override artifact.

replaces.description: Optional L0–L2 path this override replaces (same role, distinct basename preferred).

note.description: Short reason the override exists (product docs voice, no session chatter).

overrides.description: Explicit L3 overrides of kit artifacts. Prefer distinct basenames over silent in-place edits.

url.description: Registry source URL (GitHub repo or raw catalog).

ref.description: Git ref or release tag pinned at install/update (e.g. v3.1.0, main).

installedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last successful install or update that wrote this manifest.
